{{Infobox character
| name = Elder Whisper
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Elder, original master
| abilities = Path of the White Fox, cloak of invisibility
| affiliations = Wei clan
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Elder Whisper Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Elder]] Whisper is an ancient sacred beast and a foundational figure of the [[Wei clan]]. Having joined the original clan founders to establish the [[Wei clan]] in [[Sacred Valley]], he helped dominate native [[Remnants]] to secure territory. He is the creator and original master of the [[Path of the White Fox]], a signature clan technique that utilizes [[madra]] to manipulate light and sound to produce illusions and sensory deception. As a massive, five-tailed snowfox, he possesses the ability to create multiple illusory reflections of himself and can move with ghostly stealth or invisibility. Beyond his martial prowess, he possesses a limited ability to perceive glimpses of [[fate]] through his dreams, which occasionally reveal visions of impending death or destruction. He holds a position of immense respect within the clan, surpassing even the current Patriarch in honor, and possesses knowledge regarding the ancient origins of the [[labyrinth]] and methods for slaying the [[Dreadgods]].}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|An ancient sacred snowfox with white fur and five bushy tails, [[Elder]] Whisper is a prominent landmark in [[Sacred Valley]] through his towering presence. Having joined the clan founders to establish the [[Wei clan]], he serves as the original master of the [[Path of the White Fox]]. This legendary figure possesses one jet-black eye and a unique sense for [[fate]]. For a century, he has meditated on the nature of dreams while harvesting both light and dreams into his core. Even now, he remains more highly honored than the current [[Wei Patriarch]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper's tower]] is a prominent landmark in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] joined the clan founders to create the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] created the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] is more honored than the current [[Wei Patriarch]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] is a sacred fox with white fur and five bushy tails.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] has one jet-black eye.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] is an ancient sacred beast.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] is a five-tailed snowfox.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] is the original master of the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] harvests light and dreams into his core.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] has spent a hundred years meditating on the nature of dreams.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper]] has a sense for [[fate]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has encountered [[Elder Whisper]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Elder Whisper]] has a tower back home.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|During a significant gathering, [[Elder]] Whisper was notably absent. Later, a black tail struck through the center of their tower. The entity possesses the ability to utilize a cloak of invisibility, which allows for unseen visits to Heaven’s Glory. Additionally, [[Elder]] Whisper has shared information regarding a specific tool that the [[Sage]] introduced to their lands.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Whisper]] was not present at the gathering.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A black tail slashed through the middle of [[Elder Whisper]]’s tower.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Whisper]] can use a cloak of invisibility.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22">''Bloodline'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Whisper]] can visit Heaven’s Glory unseen.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Whisper]] spoke of a tool brought to their lands by the [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Elder]] Whisper is a white fox who serves as an elder within [[Lindon]]'s clan. For many years, this fox has maintained the opening of the [[Sword Sage]]’s private [[void]] space. Possessing the ability to observe the [[labyrinth]] door, [[Elder]] Whisper has expressed the belief that another individual may be present within the [[labyrinth]]. Despite this role, the fox is considered an entity that cannot be trusted.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Elder Whisper]] is a white fox.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Elder Whisper]] is an elder of [[Lindon]]'s clan.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Elder Whisper]] has held the [[Sword Sage]]’s private [[void]] space open for years.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Elder Whisper]] is a person who can observe the [[labyrinth]] door.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Elder Whisper]] is a fox that cannot be trusted.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Elder Whisper]] believes there may be someone else in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“The Sage brought this to our lands,” Elder Whisper continued,<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“Whisper is one of the elders of my clan,” Lindon said, gesturing to the fox behind him.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“And yet…” Lindon began, but he cut the sentence off before he said, “And yet you held the Sword Sage’s private void space open for years.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“Elder Whisper, we believe there may be someone else in the labyrinth,” Lindon said.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Wei clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
